name: Blueberry Snack Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Grease the pan and dust with flour.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the first nine ingredients on low speed,
mixing and blending well. In a separate bowl, gently mix together
the remaining 3 tablespoons Flour, 2 tablespoons Sugar, and Blueberries.
Fold this mixture into the batter. Pour the batter into the prepared pan
and bake for about 40 minutes. This is a delightful baked good served
on many cold mornings fresh from the oven, perfect with homemade jams.
